name: Red Lobster Cheese Garlic Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Bisquick through the cheese until a soft dough forms.
2. Beat vigorously for 30 seconds.
3. Drop dough by spoonful onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
4. Bake at 450°F for 8-10 minutes, or until golden brown.
5. Mix melted butter or margarine with garlic powder.
6. Brush over warm biscuits before removing from the cookie sheet.
7. Serve warm. Makes 10-12 biscuits.
